title: Scyphostelma harlingii
intro: Scyphostelma harlingii, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is a succulent plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress-related diseases. The bioactive constituents of Scyphostelma harlingii include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
